tasks.subject: Task 1: i18n keys for workstations namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add all new translation keys to all 3 locale files for the `workstations` namespace.

**Files:**
- Modify: `ui/web/src/i18n/locales/en/workstations.json`
- Modify: `ui/web/src/i18n/locales/vi/workstations.json`
- Modify: `ui/web/src/i18n/locales/zh/workstations.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `workstations.agents.*` keys present in all 3 locale files

**Verify:** `grep -r '"agents"' ui/web/src/i18n/locales/*/workstations.json | wc -l` → 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ui/web/src/i18n/locales/en/workstations.json","ui/web/src/i18n/locales/vi/workstations.json","ui/web/src/i18n/locales/zh/workstations.json"], "verifyCommand": "grep -r '\"agents\"' ui/web/src/i18n/locales/*/workstations.json | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["workstations.agents.* keys present in all 3 locale files"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: i18n keys for agents namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add workstation-links section keys to all 3 locale files for the `agents` namespace.

**Files:**
- Modify: `ui/web/src/i18n/locales/en/agents.json`
- Modify: `ui/web/src/i18n/locales/vi/agents.json`
- Modify: `ui/web/src/i18n/locales/zh/agents.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `agents.workstations.*` keys present in all 3 locale files

**Verify:** `grep -r '"workstations"' ui/web/src/i18n/locales/*/agents.json | wc -l` → 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ui/web/src/i18n/locales/en/agents.json","ui/web/src/i18n/locales/vi/agents.json","ui/web/src/i18n/locales/zh/agents.json"], "verifyCommand": "grep -r '\"workstations\"' ui/web/src/i18n/locales/*/agents.json | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["agents.workstations.* keys present in all 3 locale files"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Shared hook use-workstation-links.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the shared hook used by both workstation and agent views.

**Files:**
- Create: `ui/web/src/pages/workstations/hooks/use-workstation-links.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Exports AgentWorkstationLink and WorkstationInfo interfaces
- [ ] linkAgent/unlinkAgent/setDefault call correct WS methods
- [ ] Optimistic updates on mutations

**Verify:** `cd ui/web && pnpm tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep use-workstation-links` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ui/web/src/pages/workstations/hooks/use-workstation-links.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd ui/web && pnpm tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep use-workstation-links", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Hook exports AgentWorkstationLink type","linkAgent/unlinkAgent/setDefault call correct WS methods"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: WorkstationAgentsTab component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the Agents tab content for the expanded workstation row.

**Files:**
- Create: `ui/web/src/pages/workstations/workstation-agents-tab.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Renders linked agents list with default badge
- [ ] Select to link new agent
- [ ] Set default and unlink buttons
- [ ] Empty state and loading spinner

**Verify:** `cd ui/web && pnpm tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep workstation-agents-tab` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ui/web/src/pages/workstations/workstation-agents-tab.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd ui/web && pnpm tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep workstation-agents-tab", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Renders linked agents list","Link/unlink/setDefault actions work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire WorkstationAgentsTab into workstations-page.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Agents tab to the expanded workstation row.

**Files:**
- Modify: `ui/web/src/pages/workstations/workstations-page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Two tabs: Activity and Agents
- [ ] Agents tab renders WorkstationAgentsTab

**Verify:** `cd ui/web && pnpm tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep workstations-page` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ui/web/src/pages/workstations/workstations-page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd ui/web && pnpm tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep workstations-page", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Agents tab appears in expanded row"]}
```
